purpose: 503B outsourcing-facility letter with a numbered Adulterated Drug Products / insanitary-conditions section (fda_insanitary_condition rows) plus CGMP violations; exercises observation_subject (aseptic technique, EM system) vs record_review_subject (211.192 particulate investigation), a corrective-action critique that clearly belongs to the 211.192 violation, a legitimate affected_lot with a real lot id, and a no-FEI negative control.
